criteria.description: WS handler accepts identity_system_prompt message type
identity_system_prompt appends to existing system prompt, does not replace
AetherSoul constructor does not call LoadIdentityContext from files
Backward compatible: no identity injected = default system prompt only
Không implement colony multi-agent hay boundary conflicts trong change này
Không ANIMA integration trong change này
Không compile/render identity như ANIMA ProjectionCompiler
Identity từ rider gửi thẳng qua WS, không cần server-side compile
